visual.name: MarkdownMermaidRenderer
visual.description: Render Markdown content with embedded Mermaid diagrams in Power BI. Perfect for documentation, flowcharts, and process diagrams.

en-US.DataRole_markdown_Description: Columns or measures containing Markdown text to render. Each row or measure value is rendered as a separate section.
en-US.DataRole_tooltips_Description: Columns or measures to display in the tooltip when hovering over a markdown section.
en-US.view_colorMode_Description: Switch between light and dark theme for the visual
en-US.view_enableCopyMenu_Description: Show a custom right-click menu with options to copy markdown content to the clipboard
en-US.view_deduplicateValues_Description: Remove duplicate values per column before rendering. When enabled, each column is treated independently and only distinct values are shown. Useful when mixing measures and columns to avoid repeated measure values.
en-US.view_useSearchBar_Description: Show a search bar to find and highlight text within the rendered markdown content
en-US.view_allowCustomStyles_Description: Allow markdown code blocks with language 'style' to inject CSS into the visual. Disabled by default for security.
en-US.mermaid_layout_Description: Layout algorithm for diagram rendering. 'Default' lets the diagram code or frontmatter decide.
en-US.mermaid_elkNodePlacement_Description: Node placement strategy for ELK layout. Only applies when layout is 'ELK'.
en-US.mermaid_elkMergeEdges_Description: Combine parallel edges in ELK layout. Only applies when layout is 'ELK'.
en-US.mermaid_flowchartOrientation_Description: Override the orientation of flowchart diagrams. 'Default' uses the orientation defined in the diagram code.
en-US.mermaid_maxEdges_Description: Maximum number of edges allowed in a diagram
en-US.mermaid_securityLevel_Description: Security level for Mermaid rendering (loose, strict, sandbox)
en-US.mermaidThemeVars_Description: Theme selection and optional color customization for Mermaid diagrams.
en-US.mermaidThemeVars_look_Description: Visual style of diagrams. 'Default' lets the diagram code or frontmatter decide.
en-US.mermaidThemeVars_baseTheme_Description: Color theme for diagrams. 'Auto' selects light/dark based on color mode. 'Default (from diagram)' lets frontmatter or directives decide.
en-US.mermaidThemeVars_enableThemeColors_Descr: Enable to override individual theme colors. Works best with the 'Base' theme.
en-US.mermaidThemeVars_primaryColor_Descriptio: Background color of nodes and primary diagram elements
en-US.mermaidDebug_Description: Advanced settings for Mermaid diagram rendering and line break handling
en-US.mermaidDebug_showDebugPanel_Description: Shows debug information including raw Mermaid code
en-US.mermaidDebug_markdownAutoWrap_Descriptio: Enable automatic line wrapping in markdown labels
en-US.mermaidDebug_convertBrToNewline_Descript:
Converts
tags to newlines. Mermaid escapes
as text, this fixes line breaks.
en-US.mermaidDebug_autoBacktickLabels_Descript: Automatically wraps labels containing newlines in backticks. Mermaid only renders newlines in backtick-wrapped labels.
en-US.mermaidDebug_preserveLineBreaksCSS_Descr: Applies CSS to preserve line breaks in Mermaid labels (white-space: pre-wrap, br display: block)
en-US.markdown_enableLineBreaks_Description:
Render single line breaks in Markdown as
(line break). When disabled, consecutive lines are joined into one paragraph.
en-US.markdown_codeBlockWordWrap_Description: Wrap long lines in code blocks instead of showing a horizontal scrollbar
en-US.interactivity_Description: Settings for cross-filtering and selection behavior
en-US.interactivity_enableCrossFilter_Descript: When enabled, clicking on a markdown section filters other visuals based on the corresponding data row. Ctrl+Click to select multiple sections. Only available when a column (not a measure) provides the markdown data.
en-US.markdownFunctions_Description: Visual-wide settings for content formatting functions (definition lists, ordered/unordered lists)
en-US.markdownFunctions_definitionHeadingLevel: Heading level (H1–H6) applied to the term in definition lists
en-US.markdownFunctions_blankText_Description: Text shown when the value is null or empty in definition lists (e.g. '(blank)', 'n/a', '(leer)')
en-US.markdownFunctions_listHeadingLevel_Descr: Heading level (H1–H6) for the title of ordered and unordered lists. Uses the column/measure display name.
en-US.markdownFunctions_blockquoteAddHeader_De: Adds a heading above blockquote sections using the column/measure display name for identification
en-US.markdownFunctions_blockquoteHeaderFormat: Heading level (H1–H6) for the header above blockquote sections
en-US.markdownFunctions_codeBlockAddHeader_Des: Adds a heading above code block sections using the column/measure display name for identification
en-US.markdownFunctions_codeBlockHeaderFormat_: Heading level (H1–H6) for the header above code block sections
en-US.measureFormat_Description: Apply markdown formatting to individual columns or measures. For columns, each row value is formatted accordingly.
en-US.measureFormat_formatFunction_Description: Wrap the measure value in a markdown element
en-US.measureFormat_codeLanguage_Description: Language identifier for syntax highlighting in code blocks (e.g. json, sql, dax, mermaid)
en-US.measureFormat_listDelimiter_Description: Character(s) used to split the value into list items (e.g. ',' or ';')
en-US.font_Description: Font family and size settings for Markdown content and Mermaid diagrams
en-US.font_fontFamily_Description: Font family for Markdown content and Mermaid diagrams
en-US.font_headingFontSize_Description: Font size in pt for the largest heading (h1). Smaller headings (h2–h6) scale down proportionally relative to the body font size.
en-US.font_bodyFontSize_Description: Font size in pt for paragraphs, tables, lists, and other body text.
en-US.font_mermaidFontSize_Description: Font size in pt for text in Mermaid diagrams.
